name: Open War
description: Two major factions have declared open war. Their soldiers clash on the roads, settlements choose sides, and neutrality is no longer an option.

events.name: War Declared
events.description: Open hostilities have erupted between major factions.

events.name: Forced Alignment
events.description: Settlements are demanding you choose a side.

events.name: Ceasefire Rumor
events.description: Whispers of a possible ceasefire circulate. The war may end soon.
